heading: Applicability to Securities and Exchange Commission
label: 3422 Applicability to Securities and Exchange Commission
text: Except as provided in the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 [ et seq.], this chapter shall apply with respect to the Securities and Exchange Commission.15 U.S.C. 78a
notes: References in TextThe Securities Exchange Act of 1934, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 2B (§ 78a et seq.) of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 6, 1934, ch. 40448 Stat. 881section 78a of Title 15
